name: Amaretto Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (6.25 oz) Frozen Orange Juice, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the thawed frozen orange juice with half a can of water.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Combine flour, salt, pepper, paprika, and garlic powder in a bowl.
4. Coat chicken breasts with the seasoned mixture.
5. Heat oil and butter in a skillet over medium heat.
6. Sauté chicken until browned on all sides; remove and set aside.
7. Add mustard, orange juice, and Amaretto to the skillet.
8. Increase heat and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
9. Simmer for about 5 minutes until thickened.
10. Pour sauce over chicken breasts in a baking dish.
11. Cover and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
12. This dish can be frozen and reheated later.
Serves 8 - 10.
